title: PDF Viewer viewport locked at 100% browser zoom (dbg91)
description:
At 100% Edge/browser zoom the plan view page scrolled and the PDF viewer looked like a thin strip; at 65% browser zoom everything fit. dbg91 locks the plan shell to the viewport (no page scroll), blocks Ctrl+wheel from triggering browser zoom over the viewer, and sets viewer body height to ~2.9× the old baseline or 92% of remaining viewport — whichever fills the screen.

Who is affected: OVH PipeSync PDF Viewer workspace.
changeLog: Lock html/body overflow when PDF Viewer is active — fits at 100% browser zoom.
Viewer body height = max(2.9× baseline, 92% of viewport below toolbar).
Shell height tied to window.innerHeight (scales with browser zoom).
Window-level Ctrl+wheel capture over plan view → in-app zoom only.
Compact explorer/head chrome to give viewer more vertical space.
